mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, supplier_name, ops_reason_code, param_name, param_type, data_length, is_fixed_length, other_type_info, param_remark, is_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config (id, supplier_id, supplier_name, ops_reason_code, param_name, param_type, data_length, is_fixed_length, other_type_info, param_remark, is_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFixedLength,jdbcType=BIT}, #{otherTypeInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_name = #{record.supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ops_reason_code = #{record.opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_name = #{record.paramName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_type = #{record.paramType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_length = #{record.dataLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_fixed_length = #{record.isFixedLength,jdbcType=BIT},
other_type_info = #{record.otherTypeInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_remark = #{record.paramRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},

create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_name = #{record.supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ops_reason_code = #{record.opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_name = #{record.paramName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_type = #{record.paramType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_length = #{record.dataLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_fixed_length = #{record.isFixedLength,jdbcType=BIT}, other_type_info = #{record.otherTypeInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_remark = #{record.paramRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config
supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_name = #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ops_reason_code = #{opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_name = #{paramName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_type = #{paramType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_length = #{dataLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_fixed_length = #{isFixedLength,jdbcType=BIT},
other_type_info = #{otherTypeInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
param_remark = #{paramRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},

create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inquiry_reason_param_config set supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_name = #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ops_reason_code = #{opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_name = #{paramName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_type = #{paramType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_length = #{dataLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_fixed_length = #{isFixedLength,jdbcType=BIT}, other_type_info = #{otherTypeInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, param_remark = #{paramRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
